name: wuzpay
description: Point of Sale System for University Project

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,OCR" -c "blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:ocr"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && cd backend/ocr-service && python3 -m venv ocr && ./ocr/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
